title: Monsters Level Up
description: A mod that makes mobs level up alongside the Player
body:
Monsters Level Up is a mod that makes all mobs level up alongside the Player as they progress through the game. Main story advancements will make mobs harder to kill.

The triggers are : getting Iron Armor, getting Diamond Armor, enchanting, entering the Nether and killing the Ender Dragon.

---

Mobs will gain **new gear**, **abilities** and **behaviors**. Some of them include :

Mobs spawning with potion effects and more gear.

Mobs being able to use shields and flint and steel/fire charges.

Undead mobs calling for reinforcements upon getting hit.

Creepers riding spiders.

Creepers disabling shields.

Skeletons switching between melee and ranged.

Drowneds riding zombie dolphins.

Spiders setting targets in cobwebs.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Mini-bosses can spawn in the world:

Skeleton Commanders ride Spider Mothers and buff nearby mobs.

Zombie Juggernauts can reduce armor points on hit and dash.

Wither Skeleton Horsemen ride Wither Skeleton Horses and are composed of one leader and two soldiers.

Killing those mini-bosses will reward you will materials to craft gear with special abilities.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

New entities:

**Spider Mother**
![A big spider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad4146862bfeab3b78866617ab3082d6c71d9e3f.png)

Spider Mothers are tankier than normal spiders and deal more damage. On death, cave spiders will emerge from the corpse of the Spider Mother.

**Lightning Rod Creeper**
![A creeper with a lightning rod on its head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3519ca3bb8f5674319300e19a97e06cdb5fa8f37.png)

Lightning Rod Creepers spawn when it's raining. Once they get close to their target, they turn into Charged Creepers.

**Zombie Dolphin**
![A dolphin, but zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97e12579dbfda99102f68105d345dac0fa41c6a8.png)

Zombie Dolphins can rarely spawn in oceans. They attack any creature in the ocean and will bring Drowneds closer to the player.

**Wither Skeleton Horse**
![A withered skeleton horse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79366d4f0665c3423819be46349e5e5f6db8ac7c.png)

Wither Skeleton Horses can rarely spawn in the Soul Sand Valley. They are hostile and will set targets on fire and wither them. They can sometimes spawn trapped.

Wither Skeleton Horses can be tamed with Phantom Membranes.

**Made with MCreator**
